title: 21-Night South America Coastal Explorer

activities: Watch a live tango show before boarding
Walk the Ciudad Vieja old town
Visit the Punta Tombo penguin colony
Explore the Peninsula Valdés wildlife reserve
Hike in Tierra del Fuego National Park
Sail the Beagle Channel spotting sea lions
Visit the End of the World Museum
suggestedExcursions: Tierra del Fuego National Park Hike

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Very relaxing experience
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 21-Night South America Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 21-Night South America Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night South America Coastal Explorer and had a fantastic time.
